meta.description: Five categories of variables that Western framings tend to lose in translation. Sourced from the HIDDEN VARIABLE CATEGORIES section of Ontology.md.

relational.description: Variables about how components connect and reciprocate.

field.description: Variables about the surrounding energetic and informational field.
examples: Pattern absences (what should be present but isn't)

embodied.description: Variables encoded in the body, the practitioner, or developmental history.

systemic.description: Variables operating at the whole-system level.
